productDisplayName: Mumbai Slang Women Printed Turquoise Blue Kurta
description: Composition Turquoise blue and white printed kurta, made of cotton blend fabric, has short sleeves, mandarin collar with a split neckline, half buttoned placket, pin-tucks on the chest and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron mumbai slang sets cosmo street trends with this light printed kurta. Those interested in colour blocking can wear this with bright contrasting capris or pants. Others who want to keep their look classic and chic can pair this with tonal leggings, and embellished slippers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
